hero.title: Rent a Car
hero.description: A planning workspace for rental searches, vehicle option comparison, booking references, and travel-day rental details.

flow.title: Searches → Vehicles → Bookings → Insights
steps: Compare vehicle options and estimated totals

differences.title: Rental planning without marketplace assumptions
differences.description: Rent a Car keeps the user in control of provider details, pricing references, and booking records instead of pretending to offer live inventory or checkout.

items.title: Plan
items.description: Save pickup and dropoff details, dates, driver notes, budget, and search status.

items.title: Compare
items.description: Track vehicle classes, providers, daily rates, fees, deposits, availability, and preferred options.

items.title: Confirm
items.description: Store confirmed booking references, totals, contacts, pickup instructions, and cancellation deadlines.

feel.title: A calm place to compare rental decisions
feel.description: The workflow is designed for travelers who want their options and confirmed details in one private workspace before they verify details with a provider.

items.title: Practical
items.description: The first screen opens directly to saved searches and next actions.

items.title: Clear
items.description: Vehicle option totals are user-entered estimates with visible verification copy.

items.title: Focused
items.description: No payments, live pricing, fleet operations, messaging, or marketplace features are included.

audiences.title: Who uses Rent a Car
audiences.description: Rent a Car supports travelers and households comparing short-term vehicle rental choices.

items.title: Trip planners
items.description: Compare airport, city, and provider options before booking elsewhere.

items.title: Families
items.description: Track passengers, luggage, vehicle class, and pickup instructions in one place.

items.title: Frequent travelers
items.description: Keep references, deadlines, and spend summaries for repeated rental planning.

resourceSection.title: Rent a Car essentials
resourceSection.description: The app is a local planning and recordkeeping workflow, not a rental marketplace.

items.title: Search records
items.description: Pickup/dropoff, dates, driver age group, vehicle needs, budget, notes, and status.

items.title: Vehicle options
items.description: Provider, vehicle class, estimated costs, deposits, mileage, cancellation notes, and preference.

items.title: Booking records
items.description: Confirmed references, totals, provider contacts, instructions, status, and cancellation deadlines.

groupedSection.title: A simple comparison workflow
groupedSection.description: Each section supports a specific planning job without turning into fleet management or checkout.

items.name: Searches
items.description: Create, edit, duplicate, filter, sort, and delete rental planning records.

items.name: Vehicles
items.description: Compare selected search options and mark the preferred candidate.

items.name: Bookings
items.description: Record confirmed provider details and review deterministic insights.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with the Ansiversa platform model
technicalSection.description: Rent a Car follows protected mini-app routing, isolated API data, generated API types, and shared shell navigation.
items: Owner-scoped backend records in isolated tables.

finalCta.title: Open Rent a Car
finalCta.description: Start with rental searches, then compare options and record confirmed booking details.
